content.en:
Time passed again.

this day.

Ye Tian was practicing in the Aromu Fortress, and suddenly the high-level officials of the Aromu Fortress wanted to see him.

Soon, Ye Tian met the supreme commander of the Arrow Mu Fortress - the Ao Retro Demon!

Ao Retro Demon is a top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, and his strength is very strong, he belongs to the top among the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and he used to be the top ten existences on the Emperor List.

With the strength of the Ao Retro Demon, it is enough to easily kill other top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses in seconds.

"I've seen the Retro Demon Lord!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

He was very curious about why a big man like the Ao Retro Demon would suddenly summon him, even if he had great potential, he was not qualified to let the Ao Retro Demon summon him.

After all, the Ao Retro Demon is the highest status of the Ancient Demon-level powerhouse in the Aromu Fortress, and many Ancient Demon-level powerhouses have to obey the orders of the Ao Retro Demon, unless it is a major matter involving the safety of the Aromu Fortress, the Ao Retro Demon usually does not appear much.

Therefore, Ye Tian was very curious.

"God, I summoned you this time for an important matter. Ao Retro Demon Dao: "In a short time, the space-time ancient demon realm on the time-space battlefield of Huo 25 Xi will be opened, and each fortress has two places to enter, so the first and second emperor of each fortress will enter the space-time ancient demon realm and enter there to compete for resources." "

"Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm, what kind of place is this?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

Ao Retro Demon Dao: "The Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space is a special realm where the power of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space is located, and many unimaginable treasures were born there, but the ancient demon-level powerhouses are not suitable to enter, and the most suitable one is the emperor level." Of course, there is also a certain danger there, some space-time ancient demon spirits were born, these space-time ancient demon spirits are difficult to kill, and the general emperor list powerhouse will die if they enter, but the first and second powerhouses on the emperor list enter, and they have a certain ability to save their lives. "

"Lord Okuzo, I'll get in there. "

Ye Tian said.

Ao Gu Demon said again: "According to the regulations, if you obtain a treasure from the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm, you need to give half of it to the Arrow Mu Fortress, and you can keep half of it. "

"Half of it!"

Ye Tian knew that he was not qualified to bargain, after all, he was not a person from the main department of the Luo Mother, and it was already very good to be able to obtain half of the resources.

If it weren't, he wouldn't be eligible to enter there.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went back.

According to the Ao Retro Demon, there is still a period of time before entering the space-time Ancient Demon Realm, and this period of time is a very short time in the eyes of the Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, but it is still a relatively long month for him.

Using this time, he may be able to create a secret method of form that suits him again.

Time flies.

Another relatively long period of time has passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian created a second form secret method that fits him, and this form secret method is completely to enhance defense, and there is almost no increase in attack power.

Airplanes!!!!

The dense ultimate particles are inhaled into the body and fused with the body, causing countless particles throughout the body to attach a membrane.

Judging from his appearance, at this moment, his body was attached with a layer of golden light, and his defense power was increased dozens of times.

"Form Secret Method - Arrow Golden Body!"

Ye Tian gave this form secret method such a name.

At present, the Arrow Golden Body still only creates the first form and the second form, but there is nothing to say about the defense, it is terrifying!

In the time that followed, he used his battle points to exchange for various resources to assist in cultivating the secret form of the Arrow Golden Body.

Gradually, the first form of the Arojin body became small, large, and complete, and then broke through to the second form.

As time passed, his strength became more and more terrifying.

Until the time when the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm was about to open, he had already cultivated his second form to the Dacheng realm.

The second form of the Ten Thousand Law Form is complete, and the second form of the Arrow Golden Body Form is complete, plus the comprehension of the two peak ultimate arcane arts, and the comprehension of the ultimate rule realm.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength should be above Amusha, but whether it is an opponent or not, you have to fight with it to know, after all, Amusha has not made a move for a long time, and no one knows if the strength she has exposed is all, maybe she has hidden her strength!

......

Aromu Fortress.

Inside a palace.

Ye Tian and Amusha came here, and several top ancient demon-level powerhouses such as Ao Retro Demon came here.

And Ye Tian is also paying attention to Amusha, but copying talent can only spy on Amusha's talent and name, etc., and he can't see through the strength.

And Amusha is covered by a mysterious force, and it is impossible to snoop into, but its strength should be extremely strong.

Seeing that Ye Tian and Amusa were both here, Ao Gumo spoke: "Amusha, God, are you two ready?"

"Ready!"

Ye Tian and Amusha responded in unison.

Ao Gu Demon said again: "Now that you are ready, then follow us to the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space, remember, you are all subordinate to the Arrow Mother Fortress, you must not kill each other, your enemy is the emperor list powerhouse of the other main department, if there is a chance to kill the emperor list powerhouse of the other main department, then do it, but the most important thing is to save your life!"

"God, your 570 is not from the main department of the mother of Arrow, there should be fewer life-saving hole cards, this thing is for you!"

Ao Retro Demon threw out a black leaf and let Ye Tian catch it.

"This is the leaf of the Arromu Ancient Tree, it contains terrible restoring powers, this leaf can restore you from a near-death state, but this leaf can only be used once in a short period of time, and the second time it has no effect. And if you use it, it will cause some damage to your body, so don't use it as a last resort!"

"Thank you, Lord Retro Magic!"

Ye Tianying said.

Afterwards.

The Ao Retro Demon took Ye Tian and Amusa to the side of the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm.

Whew!!!

They kept shuttling, and it didn't take long for them to arrive at the core area of the Huoxi space-time battlefield, where they sensed the terrifying suppression, which was from the suppression of the space-time ancient demon pillar.

It's just that he can't perceive the existence of the space-time ancient magic pillar, not even the projection, so he can only guess that there is a space-time ancient magic pillar here.

And at this time, the ancient demon-level powerhouses of the other main departments and the powerhouses of the emperor list arrived here one after another.

Three hundred and sixty-five main departments, that is to say, this time a total of more than 700 emperor list powerhouses entered here, and each of them is the first and second emperor list of major fortresses, which shows how terrifying the competition is this time.
